subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of the Youth unto those who have clung to the cord of God, the All-Encompassing, the Mighty, the Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی الذین تمسکوا بعروه الله المهیمن العزیز القدیر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
